flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Landmark College rose 19% between 2017 and 2020 ($14.8k → $17.5k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 11 pp at Landmark College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (26.5% vs 37.8%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Landmark College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Landmark College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (403 → 455).
